creator: karl@denninger.net
text:
Note that the current Crochet "bits" do not bring over the "new" firmware and related files, which caught me unaware when building recently..... easily fixed, but probably ought to be fixed "over there".

Also note that there is an *even newer* firmware file that breaks things *badly* with all sorts of really bizarre symptoms (unit either fails to complete boot and hangs partway through device discovery, boots finally but very slowly, encounters silent lockups during operation, etc)
